'''PL-37''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] in the service of Lord [[Toat]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was destroyed when [[Sol Sixxa]] sunk the ''[[Syren]]''. [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] later recovered its head, and [[Jinkins]] was able to discover valuable information from the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] "brain" about the [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] Sixxa had stolen.

==Biography==
===Termination===
{{Quote|Lord Toat!|PL-37|<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 1" />}}
PL-37 was created to serve [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Toat]] onboard the ''[[Syren]]'' a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation pleasure liner|pleasure liner]] when Toat was killed in front of was attacked by [[Mere Resistance|renegade]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] lead by [[Sol Sixxa]]. After Sol Sixxa stole a prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|Cloaking device]] from the Liner and sunk the ship where every [[Droid/Legends|Droid]] from the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Battle Droids]] to PL-37 whose head was severed and landed on the bed near the ship.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 1" />

===Salvage Run===
{{Quote|Hey, Shiny. I brought you a present. Think you can make it sing?|Nym|<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />}}
The Droid{{'s}} head laid at the place for over a month until it was recovered by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], who was hired by [[Loreli Ro]] to track down and stop Sol Sixxa. While surveying the damage done to the ''Syren'' he found PL-37 and, after his encounter with a [[Relix]], brought it to his ship, the ''[[Sunrunner]]'', for [[Jinkins]] to work on. Despite a cracked brian case, the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] managed to get the Protocol Droid to speak again in which it expressed about a prototype technology but it burnt out before anymore information could be extracted.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />

Unbeknownst to the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|party]] the droid's powering up was picked by Trade Federation forces lead by [[Harro Ruuk]], who was on the ''Syren'' when Sixxa had sunk it, and sought to recover the cloaking device for himself.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" /> He was then able to track down the ''Sunrunner'', waiting for both forces to [[Skrmish on Mere|clash]] and then secure the ships while both forces were exhausted. Ultimately the battle ended with Nym destroying both ships by colliding the ''Sunrunner'' with the [[Revenant (Mere)|''Revenant'']]. Nym would meet up again three weeks later to forge a new alliance with Sixxa on the [[Invisible Island]], which housed multiple [[Stygium/Legends|Stygium crystals]], while holding PL-37{{'s}} head.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 3">[[Starfighter: Crossbones 3|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3]]</ref>

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Pirates!|PL-37|<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 1" />}}
PL-37 displayed standard characteristics of Protocol Droids in particular fear of violence. It also displayed fear of Pirates.

When recovered by Nym and reactivated by Jinkins it wasn't willing to cooperate immediately to their questions.
